function.name: add_hours
function.description: Add hours to a given time.
function.long_description: Calculates a new time by adding a specified number of hours to a given time.
example_user_queries: Call add_hours with time_string 07:10, hours 4, and format %H:%M.
If the time is 10:50, what do I get after adding 6 hours?
Shift 03:05 PM forward by 9 hours using %I:%M %p.
Calculate the new time after adding 7 hours to 21:40.
